task_description: Fix all Android app data models, API service definitions, repositories, and ViewModels to match actual API response formats from the Laravel backend controllers. Currently login works but profile, games, staking, etc. do not display data because the models expect different field names, types, and wrapper structures than what the API actually returns.

verification.summary: assembleDebug BUILD SUCCESSFUL. All model types, ApiService return types, repositories, and ViewModels properly updated to match API responses. No unit tests present in project to run.
